title: AIS and 26AS TDS differ by 5.9% — major_variance conflict

conflict_log_entry.user_action_required: Verify TDS deposit with employer. ₹1,600 shortfall in 26AS.

notes: Matches the scenario from V-001 (TDS mismatch). Delta = (28600-27000)/28600 = 5.59%, which exceeds the 5% major_variance threshold. 26AS value (₹27,000) is used for the TDS credit. The ₹1,600 shortfall is unclaimable until employer deposits it. This test verifies R-0007 produces the conflict; V-001 fires as a downstream consequence.
